Dialog.name: TRL_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 0}You can fuse multiple Personas in your possession to create a new Persona.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: TRL_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 0}The newly fused Persona will typically be of a higher level than its base Personas. Keep in mind that all base Personas will be lost during fusion.[n]{f 1 1}
